title: senecio ferrugineus
intro: Senecio ferrugineus, also known as Ironweed, is a plant species within the daisy family native to the southwestern United States, Mexico, and parts of Central America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat a variety of health issues, including wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Senecio ferrugineus include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy among natural healers. Senecio ferrugineus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, making it easy to incorporate into a holistic health routine.
